scenes.narration: A long time ago, everyone on earth spoke the same language. Every single person.
scenes.image_prompt: Diverse group of people from ancient times talking happily together in one big village, everyone smiling and understanding each other, bright colorful bible storybook illustration

scenes.narration: They had one big idea. Let's build a tower so tall it reaches all the way to heaven.
scenes.image_prompt: Ancient people pointing up at the sky excitedly while gathered around blueprints of a massive tower, determined expressions, colorful bible storybook illustration

scenes.narration: They wanted to make a name for themselves. To be as great as God Himself.
scenes.image_prompt: Tall proud king figure pointing up toward heaven with arms raised, crowds cheering behind him, dramatic colorful bible storybook illustration, sunny sky

scenes.narration: So they started building. Brick by brick. Higher and higher. The tower grew enormous.
scenes.image_prompt: Hundreds of workers building a colossal brick tower reaching into the clouds, bricks being carried up scaffolding, bright colorful bible storybook illustration

scenes.narration: God looked down and saw what they were doing. And He was not impressed.
scenes.image_prompt: Bright golden light breaking through the clouds shining down on the enormous tower, dramatic colorful bible storybook illustration, awe-inspiring mood

scenes.narration: So God did something simple. He changed their words.
scenes.image_prompt: Swirls of sparkling golden light descending onto the construction site, workers beginning to look confused, colorful magical bible storybook illustration

scenes.narration: Suddenly nobody understood anybody. Pass the brick became random noise. Chaos took over.
scenes.image_prompt: Workers on the tower all shouting at each other with confused angry faces, word bubbles full of squiggles and symbols above their heads, colorful funny bible storybook illustration

scenes.narration: Building stopped. People scattered across the world. And the great tower was left unfinished.
scenes.image_prompt: Massive half-built tower abandoned in the distance, groups of people walking away in different directions toward distant horizons, colorful bible storybook illustration

scenes.narration: That's why there are so many languages today. When people try to reach heaven their own way, God has other plans.
scenes.image_prompt: World map in storybook style showing people spreading out to different parts of the earth with different cultural clothing, warm sunset colors, colorful bible storybook illustration
